Izabel, the progress this year has been excellent. Now the board wants your view. What do you recommend we focus on next quarter?
Thank you, Andy. I would recommend automating the reporting first. We should prioritize that, because it still takes too much of my time.
That makes sense. And what about the new product line? Should we scale it up now?
I would suggest we hold off on that for one quarter. We ought to weigh the options carefully before we invest more.
Fair point. The partners also asked about costs. Any recommendation there?
Yes. We had better cut costs on the manual processes, and I would advise outsourcing the payroll to save time.
Good thinking. Should we hire more engineers to support the growth?
Not yet. I recommend delegating more to the current team first, and reconsidering the headcount after the audit.
I would recommend automating the reporting first.
We should prioritize the audit before we hire.
We ought to weigh the options carefully.
We had better cut costs on the manual processes.
I would suggest we hold off on the launch for one quarter.

Hi Izabel, this is Victor, your operations consultant, with a few recommendations before Thursday. First, I would strongly recommend automating the monthly report. You should not be preparing those numbers by hand anymore, so let us make that the top priority. Second, I think you ought to delegate the supplier follow-ups to your team, so that you can focus on strategy. On costs, I would advise holding off on any new hire until the audit is done. You had better wait for those figures first. And one more thing: it might be worth outsourcing the payroll, because it takes far too long in-house. Weigh the options with Andy, and let me know what you decide. Talk on Thursday.

Good morning, Izabel. This is Claire, from the board, with a quick note before the call. First, congratulations on the progress this year. It has been remarkable. Now, a few suggestions from the board. We think you should prioritize the reporting system, because it is the one thing still slowing you down. We would also recommend that you draft a simple twelve-month plan, so the partners can see where AVRT is going. On the new market, our advice is to reconsider the timing. You might want to postpone the launch until the second half of the year. And please do not try to do everything at once. You had better focus on two or three priorities. We will discuss all of this on Thursday. Thank you.
